name: block-smash-puzzle
description: Addictive block puzzle game. Place blocks, clear lines, score big!

scripts.build:android: npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:android:bundle: npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.build:ios: npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.deploy:web: npx cap sync && echo 'Ready for deployment'

author: BlockSmash Studios
